content: The 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be retrofitted to store and prioritize the unexpected, self-generated novelty signals that power curiosity-driven ICM agents, creating a 'novelty memory archive that reinforces intrinsic motivation over time. This architecture lets curious autonomous agents stop forgetting high-potential unexplored environmental patterns that would have driven future exploration, solving the common problem of curiosity fading as agents learn their environment.
